channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Market Sells Off On Oil Prices, Google, Tesla; Intel Jumps Late
item.description: The Nasdaq undercut key levels as Google and Tesla led titans lower while oil prices soared. Intel jumped late.

item.title: Tesla's Operating Margin Just Fell to 1.4% and Free Cash Flow Went Negative. Here's Where the Money Is Going.
item.description: A record quarter for revenue was also the thinnest for profit in a while. But the spending behind that gap is the real story.

item.title: Two Mag-7 Giants Hold Stakes In SPCX As Alphabet Discloses $94B Position
item.description: Alphabet’s investment implies about 6% stake in SpaceX.

item.title: Is Tesla’s Earnings Miss and Negative Free Cash Flow a Red Flag for Rivian and Lucid Investors?
item.description: Tesla shares sank heavily after reporting quarterly earnings.

item.title: Tesla's Robotaxi Stalls And Its Valuation Decline Starts
Tesla (TSLA) Is Down 18.3% After Record Revenue But Weak Q2 Profitability And Cash Flow - Has The Bull Case Changed?
item.description: Tesla’s Q2 2026 results showed record revenue of US$28.24 billion and record deliveries of 480,126 vehicles, but earnings, margins, and free cash flow weakened as higher operating expenses and capital spending on AI, robotics, and new products reduced profitability. The company’s first quarter of...

item.title: Tesla: Why I Am Cutting My Price Target After Q2 Earnings (Rating Downgrade)
Wall St falls as tech earnings spark AI spending worries
item.description: STORY: Wall Street stocks plummeted on Thursday, with the Dow dropping about 1%, the S&P 500 shedding 1.2% and the Nasdaq tumbling more than 2%. The latest earnings results from large tech companies such as Alphabet and Tesla revived concerns about heavy AI spending, says Keith Buchanan, senior p...

item.title: S&P 500, Dow, Nasdaq End Lower Over Capex Concerns, Surging Oil — CBRS, AMD, GOOGL, TSLA, MSTR In Focus
item.description: Brent crude topped $100 a barrel, stoking inflation fears and driving Treasury yields to their highest levels of the year.

item.title: 2018 Model 3!! Finally!!
item.description: I’ve literally been refreshing the app every couple hours! FSD drives me to work and back everyday but parks terribly - when it does even attempt to park. I’m super excited to see if this can fix that last 10 feet for me!

item.title: Alphabet Just Revealed Its Big Stake in SpaceX
item.description: Google parent company Alphabet said it had roughly $94.1 billion worth of SpaceX stock.

item.title: Tesla stock tumbles after earnings, one of its sharpest single-day declines
item.description: Tesla stock ( NASDAQ: TSLA ) endured one of its sharpest single-day declines in years on July 23, tumbling approximately 14.5 percent and closing near $320 after opening the session around $374. The drop erased more than $140 billion in market value amid heavy trading volume and left the shares a...

item.title: Stock Market Today, July 23: Tesla Drops 15%, Leading Tech Stock Slide
item.description: On July 23, 2026, massive capital expenditure plans triggered a broad retreat across technology stocks, as soaring crude oil added to inflation fears.

item.title: Tesla sends a quiet but powerful message on Bitcoin
item.description: Tesla made no Bitcoin sales in the second quarter of 2026. In a market starved for institutional conviction, that decision to hold speaks louder than most announcements. The electric vehicle maker disclosed its Q2 financial results on Wednesday, confirming it still holds the same Bitcoin position...

item.title: Stock Market Today, July 23: Tesla Stock Crashes on Earnings Miss and Rising AI Spending
item.description: Today, July 23, 2026, analysts cut price targets as margin pressure and autonomous-driving caution weigh on the EV leader.

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi Hits 380K Unsupervised Miles, Names Next Markets
item.description: Tesla Robotaxi Hits 380K Unsupervised Miles, Names Next Markets

item.title: Tesla record revenue masks cash burn, $1B SpaceX swing
item.description: Every public company has a number it wants you to see and a number it hopes you scroll past. Earnings season is built on that tension. The revenue line is the easy one.

item.title: Tesla Confirms FSD Is Coming to the Tesla Semi
item.description: Tesla Confirms FSD Is Coming to the Tesla Semi

item.title: v14 was just pushed to my 2021 Model Y (HW3 Intel)
item.description: Finally! It is here! V14 Lite Updating as we speak.

item.title: Elon Musk is not happy about this Tesla Full Self-Driving approval delay
item.description: Elon Musk clapped back at France’s decision to withhold the approval for Tesla’s Full Self-Driving (FSD) Supervised system, projecting a clear and blunt message to French Transport Minister Phillippe Tabarot, after he publicly rejected the technology in its current form. Tabarot outlines several ...

item.title: Tesla Reports $1 Billion Gain On Its SpaceX Equity Stake
item.description: Tesla recorded a $1 billion net gain on its investment in Space Exploration Technologies, commonly known as SpaceX, following its IPO last month, according to SEC filings. Elon Musk's electric vehicle company had a stake in SpaceX through a $2 billion investment his AI lab xAI made in January. Wh...

item.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Pounded As Oil Surges; Honeywell Crosses Trendline (Live Coverage)
item.description: The Nasdaq composite plunged and the Dow Jones Industrial Average moved sharply lower Thursday as major indexes struggled to lift off their intraday lows. Google-parent Alphabet and Tesla led the sell-off on the stock market today after their quarterly earnings reports. In Thursday morning action...

item.title: Tesla Robotaxis Are Already Running FSD V15
item.description: Tesla Robotaxis Are Already Running FSD V15

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Stock Trades Down, Here Is Why
item.description: Shares of electric vehicle pioneer Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) fell 13% in the afternoon session after the company reported a sharp second-quarter earnings miss and negative free cash flow, driven by surging costs to fund its artificial intelligence and robotics projects. Despite beating revenue estimate...

item.title: Tesla Launches Robotaxi in Tampa & Orlando, + Big Change Coming to FSD!
item.description: Tesla Robotaxi Service in Florida Tesla has now launched its robotaxi service in Tampa and Orlando, Florida. Service is pretty limited right now, but we have someone on our team who lives right next to the service area and will report back on using it once he has that opportunity. ...

item.title: 3 Tesla shareholders speak out after mixed Q2 earnings
item.description: It's hard to get a handle on Tesla's current position in the market after two asymmetrical quarters. Tesla reported second-quarter revenue of $28.2 billion, a record that topped analyst estimates of $27.6 billion. However, the 33 cents per share the company reported missed estimates from analysts...

item.title: Update: Equity Markets Fall Intraday as Brent Crosses $100; Alphabet, Tesla Tumble
item.description: (Updates with latest market prices and developments.) US benchmark equity indexes were lower intr

item.title: TSLA, GOOGL Stocks Lead 'Magnificent Seven' Rout – MAGS ETF On Track For Biggest Single-Day Loss This Year
item.description: The broader technology sector weakened after renewed geopolitical tensions in the Middle East weighed on investor sentiment.

item.title: Here's Why This Tesla-Focused ETF Crashed Today
item.description: Tesla's disappointing margins and cautious robotaxi outlook triggered the stock's decline to the detriment of this ETF.

item.title: Alphabet and Tesla Are Tanking These Sectors
item.description: Consumer discretionary and communication services indexes are having their worst day since April 2025. The S&P 500’s consumer discretionary sector was down 4.8% in recent trading, which put the sector on track for its biggest daily drop since it fell 6.5% on April 3, 2025. Tesla, with a market ca...

item.title: Tesla and Alphabet Trigger Nasdaq 2.5% Selloff as Oil Nears $100
item.description: Nasdaq Sinks 2.5% as Tesla Crashes, Alphabet's AI Spending Sparks Tech Selloff

item.title: Two Blowout Quarters, Two Selloffs: What Tesla and Alphabet Reveal About our Price Target
item.description: Tesla and Alphabet both delivered blowout quarters and both got punished by the market anyway. Before you follow the crowd and sell, our price targets reveal why the selloff reaction may be telling the wrong story entirely.

item.title: Tesla Q2: Why I Still Can't Be Bullish
Tesla and Google’s AI splurge sparks tech sell-off
item.description: Technology giants suffered a brutal sell-off on Thursday after heavy AI spending by Tesla and Google spooked investors.

item.title: Magnificent 7 Loses $767 Billion as AI Skeptics Dump Tech Stocks
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- The Magnificent Seven group of megacap technology stocks is on track for its biggest one-day drop since the tariff tantrum in April 2025 as results from Alphabet Inc. and Tesla Inc. are casting doubt on the durability of the artificial intelligence trade that has powered the stock ...

item.title: Nvidia, Tesla, Alphabet, Lockheed, AT&T, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
item.description: Alphabet and Tesla shares fall as investors worry about a rally in oil prices that could drive inflation higher.

item.title: Google’s massive stake in SpaceX will shock you
item.description: In a striking revelation that underscores the lucrative crossover between Big Tech and space exploration, Alphabet Inc., Google’s parent company, disclosed a massive $94.1 billion equity stake in SpaceX following the rocket company’s blockbuster initial public offering earlier this year. The disc...

item.title: As Wall Street Cuts Tesla, Morgan Stanley Raises Its Apple Target
item.description: Tesla just delivered one of its ugliest earnings prints in years while Apple quietly shattered revenue records, and the gap between these two titans is widening fast enough to reshape how analysts are pricing both stocks right now.

item.title: Tesla’s robotaxis are moving in reverse
item.description: The number of paid robotaxi miles traveled fell 36% in the second quarter, despite expanding to new cities, according to Tesla's own figures.

item.title: Tesla's Next Big Gambit (Rating Downgrade)
Tesla FSD Reaches 1.48 Million Active Subscriptions
item.description: Tesla FSD Reaches 1.48 Million Active Subscriptions

item.title: Tesla’s switch-up on selling Full Self-Driving has paid off big time
item.description: In early 2026, Tesla made a bold strategic pivot: it largely eliminated the option to purchase Full Self-Driving (FSD) software outright and shifted to a subscription-only model. The change, effective around mid-February, ended the one-time fee that had previously ranged as high as $15,000 and la...

item.title: Tesla Q2 Earnings: Record Deliveries Can't Fix A Broken Growth Story
Tesla (TSLA) crashes 12%, sheds $140B as Elon Musk’s ‘just trust me’ doesn’t hold anymore
item.description: Tesla stock is down more than 12% today, wiping out over $140 billion in market value, after the automaker’s Q2 2026 earnings missed on profit and free cash flow turned negative. The slide got worse during the earnings call, when Elon Musk repeated the same robotaxi and Optimus promises he’s been...

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi’s slow rollout gets explanation from Elon Musk
item.description: Tesla Robotaxi is among its biggest projects currently, but many have been quick to point out the fact that the company has definitely been slow to expand its fleet. However, there is definitely a method to that madness. CEO Elon Musk answered several concerns during last night’s quarterly earnin...

item.title: Tesla Q2: Something Doesn't Add Up
Going into reverse at a stoplight to make room for a Semi turning.
item.description: FSD 14.3.5 submitted by /u/goodguy743 [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla swapped a solar owner’s lease contract for the Book of Enoch
item.description: A Tesla solar customer went to pull up their lease agreement in their Tesla account this month and found something other than a contract waiting for them: the Book of Enoch, an ancient apocalyptic text about fallen angels. Not a scanned copy of their agreement. Not an error page.

item.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Jones Index Falls 500 Points As Alphabet, Tesla Dive On Earnings News (Live Coverage)
item.description: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index dropped 500 points Thursday as Alphabet and Tesla stock dived on earnings. Oil prices jumped.

item.title: Micron Secures Major Tesla Memory Chip Allocation
item.description: The supply agreement gives Tesla more certainty as memory prices remain elevated.
